title: baloghia inophylla
intro: Baloghia inophylla, also known as the 'lemon scented baloghia', is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Australia and the Pacific Islands. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Baloghia inophylla include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
